text:
Pell (ペル, Peru) was a beetle-like Chimera Ant Soldier. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 225 

Appearance

Pell has durable light blue skin, an outside dark blue membrane on his back, and four long spiky arms with two long sharp claws, two spiky legs, two claws, and a yellow nose. He has turquoise-colored eyes, a round-shaped head, the body shape of a ladybug, and two canine-like teeth.

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

During the Phantom Troupe's siege against Zazan's Squad in Zazan's Palace, Pell encounters Shalnark who futilely tries to manipulate him. He continuously tries to slice Shalnark with his sharp raptorial forelegs and manages to slice his abdomen. Spotting a weak point where he could insert his antenna into with a 20% chance of pulling this off without any injury, Shalnark takes the risk and inserts his antenna into a gap that's exposed between his shell when he opens his body. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 226 

Successful with his retaliation, Shalnark tries to manipulate Pell, however, the Ant ambushes instead restrained him. Perplexed by this turn of events, a small beetle-like Chimera Ant holding a joystick controller appears and reveals that he was already manipulating Pell. Left with no other alternatives, Shalnark attaches his spare antenna into himself and activates his Nen ability Autopilot mode; obliterating both Pell and Small Beetle in a single charge attack. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 227 

Abilities & Powers

Pell's exoskeleton is thicker and harder than any armor. He was enough to dissuade a physically strong, skilled Nen user like Shalnark from trying to pierce it with his antenna at first glance. He was also strong enough to keep Shalnark immobile after grabbing hold of him. Its arms are very sharp, and their length allows it to strike while preventing the enemy from getting too close. Due to their number, he can strike more times and from more angles than a human.

Nen

Because Small Beetle was manipulating Pell through his Nen ability, he was thereby "initiated" into using Nen.
